# `api.sellers.update`

> `PUT /Seller/{id}` — Catalog

**Python**

```python
api.sellers.update(seller_id: int, *, data: UpdateSellerRequest | dict) -> SellerDto
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab sellers update <seller_id> [--data ...]
```

PUT /Seller/{id}.

Args:
    seller_id: Seller identifier.
    data: Seller update payload with name and display_id.
        Accepts an :class:`UpdateSellerRequest` instance or a dict.

Request model: :class:`UpdateSellerRequest`

## Request body — `UpdateSellerRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `Optional[str]` | no | Seller name |
| `customerDisplayId` | `int` | yes | Customer display ID |
| `isActive` | `bool` | yes | Whether the seller is active |

## Response

Returns `SellerDto`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `id` | `int` | yes | Seller ID |
| `name` | `Optional[str]` | no | Seller name |
| `customerDisplayId` | `Optional[int]` | no | Customer-facing display ID |
| `isActive` | `Optional[bool]` | no | Whether seller is active |
| `displayId` | `Optional[str]` | no | Deprecated display identifier — always null per captured responses |
